text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide wins the senior division URA
award. During her interview, she's asked about
her leg injury and her sister's absence, but her
answers are vague.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide challenges Narita Brian to a
scrimmage. However, there's a sense of
awkwardness to the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian tells her that if they're going to face
each other, she wants it to be in a G1 race and
declines the invitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she has no way of knowing why Biwa
Hayahide challenged her...
